sections.title: Introduction to Regular Verbs
sections.content: In French, regular verbs follow predictable conjugation patterns in the present tense. The three main groups are -ER, -IR, and -RE verbs. Each group has its own set of endings that are added to the verb stem.
examples: Parler (to speak) is a regular -ER verb
Finir (to finish) is a regular -IR verb
Vendre (to sell) is a regular -RE verb

sections.title: Regular -ER Verbs
sections.content: To conjugate regular -ER verbs, remove the -er infinitive ending to get the stem, then add the present tense endings: -e, -es, -e, -ons, -ez, -ent for je, tu, il/elle/on, nous, vous, ils/elles respectively.
examples: Parler: je parle, tu parles, il/elle/on parle, nous parlons, vous parlez, ils/elles parlent
Manger: je mange, tu manges, il/elle/on mange, nous mangeons, vous mangez, ils/elles mangent
Danser: je danse, tu danses, il/elle/on danse, nous dansons, vous dansez, ils/elles dansent

sections.title: Regular -IR Verbs
sections.content: Regular -IR verbs follow a similar pattern. Remove the -ir ending to get the stem, then add the endings: -is, -is, -it, -issons, -issez, -issent.
examples: Finir: je finis, tu finis, il/elle/on finit, nous finissons, vous finissez, ils/elles finissent
Choisir: je choisis, tu choisis, il/elle/on choisit, nous choisissons, vous choisissez, ils/elles choisissent
Grandir: je grandis, tu grandis, il/elle/on grandit, nous grandissons, vous grandissez, ils/elles grandissent

sections.title: Regular -RE Verbs
sections.content: Regular -RE verbs are less common but follow a consistent pattern. Remove the -re ending and add: -s, -s, -, -ons, -ez, -ent. Note that the nous form keeps the full stem.
examples: Vendre: je vends, tu vends, il/elle/on vend, nous vendons, vous vendez, ils/elles vendent
Attendre: j'attends, tu attends, il/elle/on attend, nous attendons, vous attendez, ils/elles attendent
Perdre: je perds, tu perds, il/elle/on perd, nous perdons, vous perdez, ils/elles perdent

sections.title: Practice Exercise
sections.content: Conjugate these regular verbs in all forms: écouter (-ER), réussir (-IR), répondre (-RE).
